title: Version Title
description: The title is boring. Let's spruce it up a little!
body:
You think the title is a little boring? Not enough for ya? (probably not but you know what i mean)

Introducing the **Version Title** Rescource Pack!
Depending on the minecraft version, the title will be the update title! (yes its that simple lol)

This also removes the pesky **Java Editon** text, so the version text is visible!

What are you waiting for? Get the pack now (or don't)

even if it says wrong version its fine

This Modrinth Project is under the **MIT** License.
